zh.lifeSummary: 當Esilia Crispin於大約1023年出生時，她的父親Gilbert Crispin24歲，母親Gunnora20歲。她和William I Malet至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1087年在英國素福爾可艾也享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Esilia Crispin于大约1023年出生时，她的父亲Gilbert Crispin24岁，母亲Gunnora20岁。她和William I Malet至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1087年在英国素福爾可艾也享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crispin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Pedro, Alicia, Fernando, Manuel, Rafael, Adolfo, Alfredo, Ana, Areli, Candita.  French Adrien, Andre, Eugenie, Francoise.

English; Spanish (Crispín): from the personal name Middle English Crispin, Spanish Crispín, from Latin Crispinus, derived from crispus ‘curly-haired’ (see Crisp ). This name was especially popular in France in the early Middle Ages, having been borne by a Christian saint who was martyred at Soissons in AD c. 285 along with a companion, Crispinianus (whose name is a further derivative of the same word). Compare Crespin and 3 below.

English (of Norman origin): from Old French and Middle English crespin, crispin ‘curly-haired’, also found as Crepin; see Crippin . It is difficult to tell this apart from the personal name in 1 above. According to Lanfranc, archbishop of Canterbury (1070–1089), the Norman Gilbert Crispin was the first man to receive this nickname, and two of his sons adopted it as their surname. His grandson Gilbert Crispin became abbot of Westminster in 1085. Members of the Norman family were said to have inherited a shock of hair that stood up stiffly like a bristly pine, as though the name derived from Latin crispus pinus, but this derivation is a medieval invention.

variants.name: Crisp
meanings: English: nickname for a man with curly hair, from Middle English crisp, crips, scrip, Old English crisp, cryps (from Latin crispus), reinforced in Middle English by an Old French word also from Latin crispus. In some cases this is possibly a nickname from the personal name Crispin .
Americanized form of German Krisp: nickname from Middle High German krisp, krispel ‘curly-haired man’.
Americanized form of German Krisp: from a short form of the medieval personal name Krispin (see Crispin ).

variants.name: Crippen
meanings: English: variant of   Crispin  .
Irish: variant of   Gribbin  .

variants.name: Crespin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Raul, Vidal, Adelina, Alfonso, Amador, Andres, Aniceto, Delfino, Emilio.
Spanish (Crespín): variant of Crispin .
French: from the Latin personal name Crispinus (see Crispin ).

variants.name: Crispen
meanings: English: variant of   Crispin  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.
Americanized form of German Krispin, a cognate of Crispin .

variants.name: Crispino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Luigi, Carlo, Amato, Angelo, Antonio, Domenico, Fiore, Gennaro, Michelina, Rocco, Sal, Salvator.
Italian (southern): from the personal name Crispino, from Latin Crispinus, a derivative of the old Roman surname Crispus ‘curly(-headed)’ (see Crispin ).

variants.name: Crippin
meanings: English: variant of   Crispin  .
Irish: variant of   Gribbin  .

variants.name: Crespi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jaime, Juan, Mercedes, Racquel, Alberto, Alejandro, Consuelo, Eduardo, Jose, Jose Manuel, Migdalia, Pedro.  Jewish Aron, Nissim.
Catalan (Crespí): from a personal name, the Catalan equivalent of Crispin .
Italian (northern): variant of   Crespo  .

nameMeanings.name: Esilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Amelia  , first recorded in the medieval period.

variants.name: Emilio
meanings: From the Latin family name Aemilius (probably from aemulus ‘rival’).

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Esilia Crispin was born about 1023, her father, Gilbert Crispin, was 24 and her mother, Gunnora, was 20. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with William I Malet. She died about 1087, in Eye, Suffolk, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Esilia Crispin est née environ 1023, son père, Gilbert Crispin, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Gunnora, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec William I Malet. Elle est décédée environ 1087, à Eye, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Esilia Crispin um 1023 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert Crispin 24 und ihre Mutter Gunnora 20. Sie hatte mit William I Malet mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1087 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Eye, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Esilia Crispin è nata il circa 1023, sua padre, Gilbert Crispin, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Gunnora, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con William I Malet. Morì circa 1087, nel Eye, Suffolk, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Esilia Crispinが約1023年に生まれた時，父Gilbert Crispinは24歳，母Gunnoraは20歳であった。彼女はWilliam I Maletとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1087年にイギリススフォルクエイで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Esilia Crispin(이)가 대략 1023년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert Crispin(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gunnora(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 William I Malet(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1087년 영국 수폴크 예에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1023–about 1087: tany ho any amin'ny 1023–tany ho any amin'ny 1087

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Esilia Crispin nasceu aproximadamente 1023, seu pai, Gilbert Crispin, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Gunnora, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com William I Malet. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1087, em Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Esilia Crispin родилась около 1023 г., её отцу по имени Gilbert Crispin было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Gunnora, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от William I Malet. Она умерла около 1087 г. в местности эи, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Esilia Crispin nació aproximadamente 1023, su papá, Gilbert Crispin, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Gunnora, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con William I Malet. Murió aproximadamente 1087, en Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
